name: agent-plugins
description: Shlomi Hod's library of AI agent plugins.

plugins.name: drive-claude-code-with-tmux
plugins.description: Drive a Claude Code instance with tmux: launch it, send prompts, poll its screen, answer its permission prompts, read back what it did, and clean up. Ships a sourceable helper library (cc_*/td_* shell functions) plus a tmux + Claude Code reference.

plugins.name: ezra
plugins.description: AI document review with tracked changes and comments.
